# ILogger.LogError method

Logs a caught Exception along with human-readable message about what was attempted before the exception was thrown.

```csharp
public void LogError(Exception exception, string message)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| exception | The exception that was caught. |
| message | The human-readable message about what was attempted before *exception* was thrown. |
